## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project standards (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))

### Documentation

### Security

- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Environment variables used for sensitive configuration
